description:
This quiz tests intermediate to advanced JavaScript developers' proficiency with the native `Date` class, emphasizing its complex API, common pitfalls, and alternatives to third-party libraries. The tone is engaging and humorous, using emojis and playful language to challenge participants.
Topics: Date object manipulation, JavaScript Date methods, Date formatting, Localization, Common API quirks
Audience: JavaScript developers seeking to deepen their understanding of the native Date API and avoid over-reliance on external libraries.
